title: Foglish Home & Garden Plastic Food Containers, 1000cc Rectangle with Lids, Microwave and Freezer Safe, Pack of 10
features: CAPACITY: 1000cc rectangular food containers perfect for meal prep, leftovers storage and takeaway portions
PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set includes 10 containers with matching snap-on lids for secure storage and transportation
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for microwave reheating, freezer storage and food transportation with leak-resistant design
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from sturdy, clear plastic material that maintains shape and clarity through multiple uses
STACKABLE DESIGN: Space-saving containers nest together when empty and stack securely when filled for organised storage
description: Keep your food fresh and organised with these practical 1000cc rectangular food containers. Perfect for meal prep, leftovers, and takeaway storage, each container comes with a secure-fitting lid that helps maintain food freshness. The clear plastic construction allows you to easily identify contents, while the durable design makes them suitable for microwave reheating and freezer storage. These versatile containers are ideal for portion control and stack efficiently to maximise storage space. The set includes 10 containers with matching lids, offering excellent value for both home and commercial use. Their robust construction ensures they can be washed and reused multiple times, making them a practical choice for daily food storage needs. The 1000cc capacity is perfect for individual portions or storing ingredients, and the rectangular shape provides efficient space utilisation in fridges and freezers. These containers are designed to withstand temperature variations, making them reliable for both hot and cold food storage.
